name: Strait of Hormuz
climate: Hyper-arid; extreme summer heat; high humidity; occasional shamal dust storms

neighbors.name: Persian Gulf
neighbors.relevance: Hormuz is the sole exit from the Persian Gulf to open ocean

neighbors.name: Gulf Cooperation Council
neighbors.relevance: GCC oil exports depend entirely on Hormuz passage

neighbors.name: Red Sea
neighbors.relevance: Alternative routing via pipelines to Red Sea ports if Hormuz is blocked

neighbors.name: Indo-Pacific
neighbors.relevance: Oil tankers exiting Hormuz head east to Asian markets via Indian Ocean

links.description: Sole maritime exit for all Persian Gulf seaborne trade
GCC economies depend on unimpeded Hormuz transit for oil revenue
~21% of global oil supply transits Hormuz; disruption would shock OPEC output delivery
Gulf-to-Europe oil route runs Hormuz to Red Sea to Suez
Fallback route for Gulf oil to Europe/Americas if Suez is also disrupted
Gulf crude bound for East Asia transits Hormuz then Malacca to reach China, Japan, Korea
Saudi East-West pipeline to Yanbu offers partial Hormuz bypass via Red Sea
